[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011111100 6
1 011010100 4
2 000001001 2
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 101110110 6
